headline: Leaked docs reveal OpenAI hemorrhaging billions annually amid expansion
body: Leaked financial documents show OpenAI is losing billions of dollars per year, raising questions about the company's path to profitability as it expands globally and adds senior talent like researcher Noam Shazeer. For healthcare AI vendors and enterprise buyers, OpenAI's financial pressure directly impacts roadmap reliability and pricing sustainability for models powering clinical documentation, diagnostic support, and administrative automation. Healthcare systems betting on OpenAI's API infrastructure need contingency plans if the company's burn rate forces strategic pivots or funding constraints. This volatility underscores why healthcare organizations should evaluate multi-model strategies and negotiate longer-term pricing commitments rather than assuming current API costs remain stable.
